name: Warm Team
tagline: Warm professional team style with navy/off-white rhythm and friendly geometric accents.

palette.description: Deep navy and off-white backgrounds alternate for rhythm; three geometric accent colors each carry an emotional role: orange (energy/action), blue (reliability/tech), purple (warmth/care) — never mixed in one section.

typography.style: Rounded geometric sans-serif. Friendly and approachable rather than strictly formal. Bold headlines without being aggressive. Single typeface family.

best_for: HR tech, people management, SMB SaaS products, team culture and engagement presentations. Best when the content needs to feel professional but warm — 'built for real teams, not cold enterprise software'.
avoid_for: Consumer products (too formal) or large enterprise products (too intimate). The three accent colors are calibrated for SMB HR emotional register.
anti_patterns: placing all three geometric accent colors in the same section — they need to each own their area
making geometric shapes too large or dominant — they are supporting cast, not the lead
using for consumer lifestyle or large enterprise content — it's precisely calibrated for SMB HR
